description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 93.

Tier II: Absolute Precision

Prerequisite: Hunter’s Eye

Penetrating Shots. Your ranged weapon attacks ignore resistance to piercing damage.

Legendary Shot (Multiplier Attack). You can use your action to perform a Legendary Shot. Make a single ranged weapon attack against a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes 4d8 x 5 of the weapon’s damage type. This attack does not benefit from any bonus to its damage. On a critical hit, you do not multiply the damage dice by 2, but instead deal 6d8 x 5 weapon damage. This Multiplier Attack does not expend Legendary Points when used.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
